headline: restaurant tax credit Preparation Checklist — Chicago
articleBody:
restaurant tax credit Preparation Checklist for Chicago Clients

Before your restaurant tax credit appointment with Reclaim Tax Credits, make sure you have the following ready:

1. Payroll records
2. Tip reports
3. Tax returns
4. Employee w-2s
5. Credit card statements

Contact Reclaim Tax Credits at 1-213-537-5613 to get started.
